---
title: "database"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
import os
os.chdir("..")
```

```{python}
import polars as pl
import plotly.express as px
```

```{python}
df = pl.read_parquet("data/processed/naics4_df.parquet")
print(df)
naics =  df.filter(pl.col("first_4_naics_code") == 926140).group_by("first_4_naics_code", "year").agg(pl.col("total_wages_sum").sum(), pl.col("total_employment").sum()).sort("year")
fig = px.line(naics, x="year", y="total_wages_sum", title='Esto es arriba boster')
fig.show()
```
